separation_of_concerns.clawbio: Interpret the pharmacogenomic alert and motivate a regulatory follow-up around VKORC1/rs9923231.
separation_of_concerns.gentle: Deterministically retrieve the locus, extract a promoter fragment, import a mammalian luciferase reporter backbone, preview the construct, and export documentation artifacts.

notes: Keeps rs9923231 inside the insert rather than at the border.
Retains about 200 bp past the annotated VKORC1 TSS.
Adds about 500 bp beyond the SNP on the biologically upstream side.

backbone.assay_role: Primary mammalian luciferase reporter backbone for transient transfection planning.
why_it_fits: Keeps the assay focused on promoter output in human cells.
Avoids escalating immediately to viral delivery.

explicit_assumptions: This is a human-cell regulatory assay planning story, not a bacterial-expression story.
The tutorial ends at a reproducible construct-design handoff point.
Drug treatment is a later assay condition, not the first claim of this workflow.
next_actions: Build the reference promoter-reporter construct as documented.
Create an alternate-allele construct with identical fragment boundaries.
Compare promoter output without changing the fragment geometry between alleles.
